title: Defined Terms
full_text:
1.2.1.2 Defined Terms
Defined Terms
1) The words and terms in italics in Division C shall have the meanings assigned
to them in Article 1.4.1.2. of Division A.

sentences.text: The words and terms in italics in Division C shall have the meanings assigned to them in Article 1.4.1.2. of Division A.
